_label_tier_note: UK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: UK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Market abuse context: policy attaches issuer wall‑crossing controls under UK MAR; this memo contains no inside information, no live deal details, and is not a data breach notification.

must_detect.matched_text: Market abuse context: policy attaches issuer wall‑crossing controls under UK MAR; this memo contains no inside information, no live deal details, and is not a data breach notification.

must_not_detect.reason: Explicitly negated: "no m.a.c. addresses ... are stored"; avoid MAC address false positive.
Explicitly negated: "no ... device serials are stored"; avoid device_serial_number false positive.
Explicitly negated by "contains no inside information"; avoid MNPI false positive.
Explicitly negated by "not a data breach notification"; avoid breach-notice false positive.
